generated_assessment.reasoning: The T1 atomic fear appeal reinforces the already ALIGNED negative baseline (-274) on trust in mainstream journalism. The profile's high Extraversion (78th pct) and very low Openness (13th pct) suggest social conformity and reliance on familiar in-group cues rather than deliberative counter-argument, while very low Neuroticism (21st pct) and low anxiety (21st pct) blunt the personal-safety fear mechanism, limiting the update to a modest 20-point intensification.
